headline: Is FactSet’s New AI Compliance Suite and Chief AI Officer Reshaping Its Competitive Edge in Data Analytics (FDS)?
summary: In early March 2026, FactSet Research Systems expanded its AI push by launching integrated AI-driven KYC, AML, and risk management tools within its Workstation and appointing Kate Stepp as Chief AI Officer and Bob Stolte as Chief Technology Officer to lead AI innovation and technology modernization. This combination of new AI compliance capabilities and dedicated C-suite leadership for artificial intelligence and technology signals a deeper move to embed AI across FactSet’s core workflows...

headline: Bloomberg 500 (B500) Index Adds Eleven Securities Following March Reconstitution
summary: Bloomberg Indices announced the following changes to the Bloomberg 500 (B500) Index effective prior to the open of trading on Thursday, March 12, 2026, to coincide with the March reconstitution of the index. The B500 contains the 500 most highly capitalized US companies weighted by float market cap, reflecting a market capitalization of $58.19 trillion.
